name: Curried Quinoa

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

method: In a sizable pot over medium heat, heat oil.
Add garlic and onion to the cook and stir properly for around 2 minutes.
Add quinoa and cook while stirring to a lighter toast or for around 5
Transfer the broth into a sizable pan and bring it to a slight boil.
Lower the heat before adding curry and chili powders. Cover and simmer to
Season accordingly with salt and pepper and enjoy.
